programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs

programme.desc: The iconic Mile High Miracle where the Baltimore Ravens hand the Denver Broncos a 38-35 divisional playoff loss in double overtime after rookie kicker Justin Tucker drills a game-winning, 47-yard field goal.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: What an alternate golf universe looks like; troubles lefties face in golf; a new product that could be the next big thing in golf.

programme.title: The Conor Moore Show
programme.desc: The most popular comedy skits and sketches from three seasons of The Conor Moore Show; from marriage counseling to the best (or worst) swing coach in the world, Conor and friends are guaranteed to provide a laugh.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: A Pee.S.A that takes on cheaters in charity golf scrambles; how surfers and skateboarders are changing golf.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Ultimate Distance
programme.desc: Ultimate Distance is your step-by-step blueprint to hitting it longer and more consistently than ever before; breaking down key moves that generate power with the driver while also teaching you how to dial in your iron distances for total control.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Ultimate Distance
programme.desc: Ultimate Distance is your step-by-step blueprint to hitting it longer and more consistently than ever before; breaking down key moves that generate power with the driver while also teaching you how to dial in your iron distances for total control.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: What an alternate golf universe looks like; troubles lefties face in golf; a new product that could be the next big thing in golf.

programme.title: Golf Channel Games
programme.desc: GolfPass brings you thousands of lessons from the game's best instructors, original series, news, features and more.

programme.title: The Swing Gym
programme.desc: World-renowned fitness coach Don Saladino is joined by Paige Mackenzie and Devan Bonebrake to teach exercises that will build a better backswing, improve transition and help stick the finish.

programme.title: The Swing Gym
programme.desc: Fix bothersome swing flaws with specific exercises that Don Saladino designed for golfers.

programme.title: The Swing Gym
programme.desc: World-renowned fitness coach Don Saladino is joined by Paige Mackenzie and Devan Bonebrake to teach exercises that will stop the slice, increase distance and help maintain balance throughout the swing.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you hit more greens and make more powerful contact with the irons by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - 2-Minute Drills
programme.desc: John Montgomery is teaching simple but effective drills that can be done pre-round to improve from tee-to-green. Learn how to stop slices and hooks with the driver, improve tempo and rhythm with your irons and more.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - 2-Minute Drills
programme.desc: John Montgomery is teaching simple but effective drills that can be done pre-round to improve from tee-to-green. Learn how to eliminate the chicken wing for more accuracy with the driver, fix fact contact with your irons.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: On Tour/On Course
programme.desc: Comic Jim Jefferies is in Las Vegas and goes to Lisa Vanderpump's restaurant, the Pinball Hall of Fame, and tees it up with Forrest Shaw, Amos Gill and Scot Armstrong at the Revere Golf Club.

programme.title: On Tour/On Course
programme.desc: Comics Ron White, Chris Voth and Pat McCollum play Driftwood Golf and Ranch Club in Austin, Texas; after the bus breaks down, the team has to pivot to Cleveland to show Ron's life on the road and stand-up comedy career.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick talks about the underlying principle of distance -- clubhead speed -- and the keys to gaining more distance with the driver. McCormick also explains and demonstrates range of motion and speed development.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick, the 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year and coach to three-time major champion Jordan Spieth, unlocks the secrets to building a championship-caliber golf game.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick brings you inside his lab to scientifically prove how ground forces affect the golf swing. McCormick explains how to achieve maximum power with the lead leg and how to move properly through the swing with the trail leg.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: The most common problem for amateur golfers is the slice. Cameron McCormick, the 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year, tackles this issue by explaining how club delivery with the face and path dictates curve.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.sub-title: The Playbook - Snake in the Grass
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick moves to the putting green to teach the best strategies to making more putts and conquering the dreaded yips. McCormick explains the importance of the start line and how to gain control of the putter face for optimal control.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.sub-title: The Playbook - Foundation and Coordination for Juniors
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick, the 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year, unlocks the secrets to building a championship-caliber golf game.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick teaches the what and how behind the score-saving shots that amaze people who watch professional golf. Specialty shots take center stage as viewers learn how to execute the "Skid Spinner," "Super Flop," and the "Banker."

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick demonstrates how to execute difficult fairway bunker shots, dreaded mid-range bunker shots, and buried bunker lies.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick talks about the underlying principle of distance -- clubhead speed -- and the keys to gaining more distance with the driver. McCormick also explains and demonstrates range of motion and speed development.
